examples: It was concluded that the product was hollow spheres co-constructed by analcime and sodalite characterized by XRD and SEM.
The family of zeolites that can be synthesized by the new dry powder method was extended from pentasil zeolites to sodalite having the structure composed of 4- and 6-member rings.
By changing the proportion of raw materials, different kinds of molecular sieves are obtained, such as those of 4A zeolite, B zeolite, X zeolite , hydroxy sodalite and their mixtures.
